tasks_completed.details: Fixed rustfmt failure (import line too long) and DCO check failure (missing Signed-off-by on top commit). Amended and force-pushed.
Fix for #52299: edge-tts produces 0-byte files for Chinese text. Added CJK detection to auto-switch from en-US-MichelleNeural to zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural when text is CJK-dominant. Tests added.

tasks_skipped.reason: Approved by DOsinga, CI green. Awaiting maintainer merge.

notes: Fixed CI failures on goose #7996 (format + DCO). Opened new PR openclaw/openclaw#52355 for Chinese TTS fix. Multiple openclaw bugs already have competing PRs (#52339, #52250, #52208). Goose at PR cap.
